title: keyring put(): non-UTF-8 value returns Backend instead of DecodeFailed
description: secretx-keyring/src/lib.rs put() line: 'return Err(SecretError::Backend { backend: "keyring", source: "keyring backend requires UTF-8 secret values".into() })'. SecretError::Backend signals transient failure — callers may retry. A non-UTF-8 value will never become valid UTF-8 on retry; this error is permanent. Fix: use SecretError::DecodeFailed instead. Per CLAUDE.md conventions, Backend is for transient backend errors that may succeed on retry.
